regression.outputTail:
a DIRTY PR is rebuilt, never armed)
ok 82 the propose-pr lane does not disarm a PR that was never armed (disarming is idempotent)
ok 83 the bump lane NEVER disarms (the reverse direction must not misfire on autoDeploy apps)
ok 84 the bump lane does not disarm on the REBUILD path either (a DIRTY armed autoDeploy PR keeps its arming)
ok 85 bump-poll never calls gh pr create directly (PR creation goes through ensure-bump-pr)
ok 86 bump-poll never pushes the bump branch directly (a skip decision must mutate nothing)
ok 87 bump-poll drives the PR step through tools/ensure-bump-pr.ts
ok 88 the bump branch name carries no RUN_ID (same bump converges to one branch)
ok 89 the bump step creates the branch, bumps the tag, commits, and only then calls ensure-bump-pr (in that order)
ok 90 auto-merge is armed only by ensure-bump-pr (bump-poll never runs the shared script itself)
ok 91 the lane is forwarded verbatim from the planner (only autoDeploy can arm auto-merge)
ok 92 the two lanes reach the executor with their own --action (hermetic run of the real bump step)
ok 93 the pr-sweeper no longer selects bump-poll branches (the executor owns that namespace)
ok 94 no workflow advances a bump-poll PR (gh pr update-branch and gh pr merge never see that namespace)
ok 95 the reconcile pass runs with NO planner output at all (no plan.json, no reader token) — its subjects come from the namespace
ok 96 the reconcile job carries no reader token and no planner step (revocation cannot be starved by candidate planning)
ok 97 one app's fail-closed never starves the apps after it (each bump item is isolated, the run still goes red)
ok 98 a failing reconcile job never starves the bump loop, and a failing bump loop never starves revocation (and both still turn the run red)
ok 99 the commit the workflow EFFECTIVELY makes carries the identity and message the executor proves ownership with
ok 100 the effective-ownership witness has teeth (a later git config override and a --amend both flip it RED)

characterization.outputTail:
4 bespoke descriptor without autoDeploy is fail-closed (propose-pr, never auto bump)
ok 35 bump rewrites only image.tag in the app's values.yaml
ok 36 bump is idempotent (second run is a no-op)
ok 37 bump --digest records image.digest alongside the tag
ok 38 bump rejects a malformed digest with exit 2
ok 39 bump with same tag and digest is a no-op
ok 40 tag-only bump removes a stale digest (image must follow the new tag)
ok 41 bump refuses path traversal outside apps/
ok 42 bump workflow joins the global homelab-mutation queue (no pending loss)
ok 43 bump rejects an unknown flag with exit 2 (typo'd --digest must not silently drop the pin)
ok 44 bump --expect-current aborts when current tag differs (races-4 TOCTOU)
ok 45 bump --expect-current proceeds when current tag matches
ok 46 bump rejects a value-flag with no value (arity, F2 digest-pin downgrade class)
ok 47 bump rejects a value-flag whose value is another --flag (arity)
ok 48 bump: v1 repository_dispatch path fully removed (writeback-dispatch gone)
ok 49 bump --pin edits the inline repo:tag@digest scalar in a bespoke deployment.yaml
ok 50 bump --pin without --digest is refused (bespoke pins are always digest-pinned)
ok 51 bump --pin --expect-current aborts on a tag mismatch (TOCTOU, exit 3)
ok 52 bump --pin is idempotent (same tag+digest is a no-op)
ok 53 bump --pin refuses a descriptor outside platform/ (path traversal guard)
ok 54 bump also refreshes the digest-exporter APPS tag for an app already listed
ok 55 bump leaves the digest-exporter byte-identical for an app not listed in APPS
ok 56 bump-poll passes --expect-current to bump-tag after checkout main (TOCTOU guard)
ok 57 bump-poll still checks out main fresh before each branch (snapshot reset)
ok 58 expect-current is sourced from the planner snapshot, not re-read from live values.yaml (F2)
ok 59 bump-poll branches on the bespoke pin descriptor and passes --pin to bump-tag
ok 60 bump-poll git-adds the planner writePath (unifies apps and bespoke lanes)
